item.title: IFlight Nazgul Evoque F5D V2 is not a good FPV frame
item.description: All these holes and hollows in the carbon are made for making the frame lighter but these area are prone to break during a crash. The frame is less rigid, and don’t cool down any better the electronic. It’s just pleasing to the eye nothing else. I suspect the carbon also to be of a lesser quality. First FPV frame I broke in 5 years… luckily the DJI O3 camera is fine.
